source.multipart_basis: The original sample already specifies body_count=2 (impeller, manifold). Multipart decomposition formalizes the PLA impeller + 4-outlet manifold + 4 valve/nozzle heads + O-ring seals + keyed shaft interface as distinct part families.

full_prompt:
Design the ASABE CN12 Fountain Wars PLA 3D-printable centrifugal pump and 4-outlet nozzle manifold as a multi-part assembly, explicitly modeling the fountain-delivery system as the physical collection of the pump impeller, pump volute/manifold body, nozzle heads, valve bodies, O-ring seals, and the keyed shaft interface to the 12 VDC motor.

The assembly consists of six part families: (A) the PLA centrifugal impeller, a semi-open 60 mm outer diameter x 20 mm inlet eye x 6 blades x 2 mm blade thickness x 25 deg outlet angle part mounted on a 5 mm keyed shaft; (B) the pump volute + 4-outlet nozzle manifold body, a printed PLA or PETG part that houses the impeller and routes flow to four independently valved outlets; (C) four nozzle heads corresponding to the four valved outlets: height-shooter nozzle (12 mm exit), wide-fan spray nozzle (5 mm slit), target-jet nozzle (6 mm exit), and accuracy-task pop-up nozzle (8 mm exit); (D) four valve bodies (shut-off or throttle valves) upstream of each nozzle head; (E) standard elastomeric O-ring seals at the impeller shaft, volute-to-manifold joint, valve bodies, and nozzle interfaces; (F) the keyed 5 mm shaft that couples the impeller to the 12 VDC motor and transmits the torque reaction.

Geometry inherits the original sample verbatim: impeller OD 60 mm, inlet eye 20 mm, 6 blades, outlet angle 25 deg, blade thickness 2.0 mm, 5 mm keyed shaft, 4 nozzle outlets (12/5/6/8 mm).

Material inherits verbatim: printed PLA (E 3.5 GPa, yield 50 MPa, density 1240 kg/m^3) as the primary body material; O-rings are standard NBR/EPDM elastomer.

Loads inherit verbatim: LC1 design operating point (30 L/min at 3.0 m head at 3000 rpm); LC2 centrifugal structural at 3000 rpm on impeller; LC3 modal separation around 50 Hz operating frequency.

Pass/fail criteria inherit verbatim from the original and apply at the assembly level: (R1) delivered flow at 3.0 m head >= 30 L/min at BEP; (R2) shaft power at BEP <= 60 W; (R3) max hoop stress in impeller at 3000 rpm <= 25 MPa (PLA yield 50 / SF 2.0); (R4) impeller tip deflection under centrifugal load <= 0.3 mm; (R5) no impeller mode shape within +/- 20% of 50 Hz operating speed (i.e., no natural frequency in the 40-60 Hz band for the first three modes). Added assembly-level targets under fem_check_policy.assembled_only: volute-to-manifold and manifold-to-nozzle joint leak + DCR must be reported; per-part stresses are reported for diagnostic purposes but do not gate pass/fail.

Thermal, radiation, and buckling analyses are not required. Fluid analysis (CFD or 1D affinity) is required for R1/R2 head-flow curve. Structural FEA is required for R3/R4. Modal analysis is required for R5. Deliver STEP AP242 of the assembly with each body (impeller, volute/manifold, each nozzle head, each valve body, each O-ring, shaft) as a distinct solid tagged with part_family (A..F) and instance_index, plus a performance report with head-flow curve, BEP, shaft power, impeller stress, deflection, first three natural frequencies, assembly mass, and joint leak / DCR.
short_prompt:
Design the ASABE CN12 Fountain Wars PLA centrifugal pump + 4-outlet nozzle manifold as a multi-part assembly (impeller, volute/manifold body, four nozzle heads, four valve bodies, O-ring seals, keyed shaft).

Impeller OD 60 mm x inlet eye 20 mm, 6 blades at 25 deg outlet angle, 2.0 mm blade thickness, 5 mm keyed shaft; four nozzle exits 12/5/6/8 mm. Printed PLA E 3.5 GPa, yield 50 MPa, density 1240 kg/m3.

Load cases: LC1 design operating point 30 L/min at 3.0 m head at 3000 rpm; LC2 centrifugal structural at 3000 rpm; LC3 modal separation around 50 Hz operating frequency.

Pass/fail: flow >= 30 L/min at 3.0 m head; shaft power <= 60 W at BEP; hoop stress at 3000 rpm <= 25 MPa (yield 50 / SF 2.0); tip deflection <= 0.3 mm; each of first three modes outside 40-60 Hz band (+/- 20% of 50 Hz); FEM at assembled level; joint/seal DCR <= 1.0.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: BEP head-flow curve can be generated by affinity-law scaling from a baseline impeller performance test, without full CFD.

prompt.title: PLA centrifugal pump + nozzle manifold (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Multi-part PLA pump + 4-outlet nozzle system: impeller (A) + volute/manifold body (B) + 4 nozzle heads (C) + 4 valves (D) + O-ring seals (E) + keyed shaft (F). 60 mm OD, 6 blades, 30 L/min at 3.0 m head at 3000 rpm. Verified at assembly level: flow >= 30 L/min, shaft power <= 60 W, impeller hoop stress <= 25 MPa, tip deflection <= 0.3 mm, no mode in 40-60 Hz band, and joint leak/DCR within budget.

parts.name: pla_impeller
parts.role: semi-open centrifugal impeller, 60 mm OD x 20 mm inlet eye, 6 blades at 25 deg outlet angle, 2 mm blade thickness, 5 mm keyed bore; converts 3000 rpm shaft input into 3.0 m head x 30 L/min at the BEP

parts.name: volute_manifold_body
parts.role: printed PLA or PETG pump volute + 4-outlet nozzle manifold body housing the impeller and routing flow to four independently valved outlets

parts.name: nozzle_head
parts.role: printed nozzle head at the end of each of the 4 manifold branches: 12 mm height-shooter, 5 mm wide-fan slit, 6 mm target-jet, 8 mm accuracy-task pop-up

parts.name: valve_body
parts.role: shut-off or throttle valve body upstream of each nozzle head; enables independent valving per the fountain-delivery challenge
parts.material_hint: printed PLA or PETG + O-ring seal

parts.name: o_ring_seal
parts.role: standard elastomeric O-ring seal at the impeller shaft, volute-manifold joint, valve-body joints, and nozzle interfaces
parts.count_note: 1 shaft seal + 1 volute-manifold + 4 valve body + 4 nozzle = ~10 seals; minimum 8 for the primary fluid path

parts.name: keyed_shaft
parts.role: 5 mm diameter keyed shaft coupling the impeller to the 12 VDC motor; transmits the 3000 rpm torque reaction

assembly_envelope.overall_bbox: approximately 150 x 150 x 100 mm including manifold + nozzles
assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: pump coordinates: +x along shaft axis, +y and +z in the impeller plane

boundary_conditions.shaft: torque reaction at 5 mm keyed shaft
boundary_conditions.casing: annular rigid casing wall around impeller

objective.primary: meet flow-head target at <=60 W shaft power under assembled_only FEM check

pass_fail_criteria.rule: each natural frequency f_i must satisfy |f_i - 50 Hz| / 50 Hz >= 0.20, i.e. f_i outside 40-60 Hz band, for i=1..3

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: joint leak-rate + DCR at volute-manifold, manifold-nozzle, and valve-body O-ring seals

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: second-order tet for impeller, shell for manifold

interfaces.load_path: keyed shaft transmits 3000 rpm torque from motor into the impeller hub
impeller rotates within the volute body; fluid pressure and viscous shear act on the impeller and are reacted by the volute wall
threaded or bonded joint between the manifold body and each nozzle head with an O-ring seal
threaded joint between the manifold body and each valve body with an O-ring seal
O-ring seats in the volute-manifold boss that houses the shaft seal
O-ring seats in each valve body for inlet/outlet seals

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: The original sample already specifies body_count=2 (impeller + manifold); the multipart sidecar expands that to include nozzle heads, valve bodies, O-ring seals, and the shaft as distinct part families.
notes.speculation_caveats: Exact valve body type, O-ring sizes, and shaft material are speculated; the original prompt only specifies the impeller geometry and nozzle exit sizes.
